prompt: Ultra-realistic wide full-body photograph of a sacred Brazilian blessing ceremony outdoors in a lush tropical garden. Wide shot showing two women from head to bare feet on green grass surrounded by palm trees. The shaman healer stands behind a seated woman performing a benzeção with fresh green herbs. The shaman is the same woman from the reference image — same face, same colorful crocheted rainbow poncho with V-shaped stripes in pink, green, blue, yellow, red, purple, white and colorful tassels at bottom, same white turban with golden band and turquoise stone, cowrie shell bracelet. Her full poncho visible from shoulders to below hips. She gently presses fresh arruda and rosemary herbs on the seated woman's head with one hand, her other hand rests lovingly on the woman's crown channeling healing energy. She has a warm loving radiant smile, eyes half-closed in deep spiritual connection, radiating pure love and sacred joy. The seated woman wears a flowing white dress, barefoot on grass, head gently bowed, eyes closed, peaceful serene smile, palms open upward on her lap receiving energy. She is deeply centered and surrendered. Golden hour god rays pierce dramatically through the palm tree canopy above, creating spectacular beams of warm divine light illuminating both figures from behind. Hundreds of golden luminous particles float in the air around them like sacred cosmic dust caught in the sunbeams. A warm golden-green glow radiates subtly from where the herbs touch the person's head — the healing energy transfer made visible. The tropical garden with tall palm trees and lush green plants surrounds them like a natural sacred cathedral. 35mm lens, f/2.8, ISO 200. Camera positioned 3 meters away at eye level. Both figures sharp, background in warm golden-green bokeh. Documentary realism. Benção Sagrada do Cantuá.
